## Type of Change

- [ ] `feat` — new feature
- [ ] `fix` — bug fix
- [ ] `refactor` — code change that neither fixes a bug nor adds a feature
- [ ] `docs` — documentation only
- [ ] `style` — formatting, no logic change
- [ ] `test` — adding or correcting tests
- [ ] `chore` — tooling, build, or dependency changes

## Checklist

- [ ] My code follows the [Style Guide](../docs/STYLE_GUIDE.md#swift-style-guide)
- [ ] I have performed a self-review of my own code
- [ ] I have added tests that prove my fix is effective or my feature works
- [ ] New and existing tests pass locally
- [ ] Commit messages follow [Conventional Commits](../CONTRIBUTING.md#commit-messages)
- [ ] This PR targets `develop` (not `main`)
